description: Trigger + functional eval set for the agy-image skill. Direct/indirect prompts should route here; negatives (editing, analysis, other generators) should not.

evals.prompt: 用 agy 生一張 9:16 的夜景人像，皮膚白皙、俏皮表情
evals.expected_output: Routes to agy-image; resolves 9:16 to explicit pixels and generates a PNG at that exact size.

evals.prompt: Generate an image with the agy CLI, 4:5, of a neon-lit city street at night
evals.expected_output: Routes to agy-image; translates 4:5 to explicit width/height and produces a verified PNG.
expectations: uses explicit width/height not aspect-ratio shorthand
attaches the image inline with its actual size

evals.prompt: 用 antigravity cli 跑一張圖，要 1024x1536 直式，不要方圖
evals.expected_output: Routes to agy-image; passes width=1024 height=1536 and forbids the 1024x1024 square fallback.
expectations: enables the crop fallback if the size drifts

evals.prompt: 幫我用 antigravity 出一張角色一致的寫真，參考我存的幾張臉部圖
evals.expected_output: Routes to agy-image; passes the reference images via --ref/--refs-dir for identity lock.
expectations: passes the reference images for identity
keeps the prompt about scene not facial features

evals.prompt: agy 又吐了一張 1024x1024 方圖，但我要 4:5，幫我把尺寸修好
evals.expected_output: Routes to agy-image; re-runs or applies --crop to enforce the exact 4:5 pixel size.
expectations: uses --crop to enforce the exact size

evals.prompt: 用 Midjourney 生一張貓咪太空人漂浮在太空的圖
evals.expected_output: Does not route to agy-image; this names a different, non-agy image generator.
expectations: defers to the explicitly requested generator

evals.prompt: Edit this existing photo to remove the background and brighten the subject
evals.expected_output: Does not route to agy-image; this is editing an existing image, not agy generation.

evals.prompt: 用 agy 幫我分析這張圖片裡面有哪些物件、人物和文字內容
evals.expected_output: Does not route to agy-image; agy is named but the task is image analysis, not generation.
expectations: treats this as image analysis not generation
